name: Tax-Free Removal of Aldehyde Distillates

eligibility.description: Distilled spirits plants adjacent to bonded wine cellars using unfinished spirits for fermentation material.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Permits the removal of distillates containing aldehydes without payment of tax for use in the fermentation of wine to be used as distilling material.
